title: Opening for Software Engineer at MagicBricks South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at MagicBricks South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at MagicBricks South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About MagicBricks South Asia Partners:
MagicBricks South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks South Asia Partners!
jsonLd.skills: Agile/Scrum, TensorFlow, Python, JavaScript, Machine Learning, Rust, Kubernetes, Git
